auditor.standards: US GAAS; financials prepared in US GAAP

note1_significant_accounting_policies.nature_of_business: Regional franchisor of quick service pizza and pasta restaurants operating as Rocky Rococo Pizza and Pasta in Wisconsin and Minnesota. 31 restaurants at date financials were issued.
note1_significant_accounting_policies.fiscal_year: 52-53 week period ending last Monday in December
note1_significant_accounting_policies.cash_and_equivalents: Highly liquid investments with original maturities <= 3 months; FDIC-insured banks; balances may exceed FDIC limits at times

receivables.basis: Net amount expected to be collected with allowance for credit losses (CECL)
receivables.franchisee_credit_terms: Unsecured; royalty and advertising fees due end of following week
receivables.allowance_for_doubtful_accounts: $0 for all 3 years; no provisions or write-offs

note1_significant_accounting_policies.long_lived_asset_impairment: Annual review for indicators; undiscounted cash flow test; no indicators identified FY22-FY24

revenue_recognition.performance_obligation_treatment: Pre-opening activities as a single performance obligation; fees recognized when location opens or transfers
revenue_recognition.royalty_recognition: Up to 5% of gross revenue; recognized when earned by franchisees
revenue_recognition.royalty_retroactive_stepdown: 3.5% credit applied to future balance if annual gross sales threshold missed
revenue_recognition.advertising_fee_recognition: 0.75% of gross revenue; unused amounts recorded as cooperative advertising fund surplus

note1_significant_accounting_policies.related_party_VIE_election: Elected ASU 2018-17 alternative; does not apply VIE guidance to entities under common control

note3_location_information.geographic_note: Affiliate and predecessor locations all in Wisconsin

deferred_tax.driver: Temporary differences in depreciation methods for tax vs book

note5_related_party_transactions.facility_lease: Company conducts operations in a facility leased by a related party; no rent charged

lease_accounting: No ROU asset or lease liability disclosed; consistent with zero-rent related party facility and immaterial P&E
VIE: Company elected ASU 2018-17 alternative to not apply VIE guidance to commonly controlled related parties
